nasb.text: I did not recognize Him, but so that He might be manifested to Israel, I came baptizing in water.”

esv.text: I myself did not know him, but for this purpose I came baptizing with water, that he might be revealed to Israel.”

cnv.text: 我本來不認識他，但為了要把他顯明給以色列人，因此我來用水施洗。”

ccb.text: 我以前并不认识祂，现在我用水给人施洗，是要把祂显明给以色列人。”

csbs.text: 我以前也不认识他，但为了让他向以色列显明，所以我来用水施洗。”
